creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> … I have no idea how I got there; …

Ah, probably via <https://www.freebsd.org/projects/newbies/>, the second of the two 'search' links under 'Questions and Support'. 

As a side note, I almost never clicked the 'New to FreeBSD?' button, at the home page, because I used PC-BSD and TrueOS (and so, largely avoided the FreeBSD site) for years before I switched to installing FreeBSD. I never thought of myself as new. 

Back on topic: I reckon, there should be an unmistakable link from the home page, to the search page.
